exam_format: Closed-book multiple choice test (Managing Safely) plus practical risk assessment project
exam_price_notes: Executive-level programme. Typically £500–£1,200 per person depending on provider and format.

testing_centers.notes: IOSH courses are delivered by IOSH-licensed training providers globally. Managing Safely online version is available through e-learning providers. Tests are taken within the course (either in-room or online via the provider's platform).

id_requirements: ID requirements set by the delivering training provider. Typically government-issued photo ID required for certificate registration.
exam_rules: Managing Safely written test: 20 multiple choice questions, 45 minutes, closed-book. Risk assessment project: candidates apply course learning to a real workplace scenario; submitted and marked separately. Both components must pass for certification.
renewal_options: IOSH Managing Safely certificates are valid for 3 years. Refresher courses are available and recommended before expiry. Full recertification requires retaking the test and submitting a new project.

retake_policy.notes: Resit arrangements are made through the delivering training provider. Policy varies by provider; typically a resit fee applies.

official_study_resources.title: IOSH Managing Safely Course Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Course materials provided by the IOSH-licensed training provider as part of the course fee.
